profile.name: Jongwo Sancho Emmanuel
profile.title: Finance Professional | Analysis & Valuation | Strategic Decision-Making
profile.about: Finance professional with expertise in financial analysis, business valuation, and data-driven decision making. Proven ability to translate complex financial information into strategic recommendations. 3+ years of direct financial control experience.

highlights.title: Financial Analysis
highlights.description: Analyze financial data to identify trends, assess performance, and support business decisions.

highlights.title: Business Valuation
highlights.description: Evaluate companies and investments to determine fair value and recommend action.

highlights.title: Financial Control
highlights.description: Maintain accuracy, reconcile accounts, and ensure compliance with audit standards.

projects.title: Financial Data Analysis: 22,000 Market Events
projects.description: Analyzed 22,000+ financial records to understand market patterns and build decision-support model.
projects.details: Worked with large dataset of 22,000+ financial events to identify factors that influence market performance. Validated data quality and accuracy. Built analytical model to test how different market factors drive returns. Results identified 5 key factors that influence stock performance. Demonstrates ability to manage large financial datasets and extract insights that support business decisions.

projects.title: Business Valuation: Merck Pharmaceutical Company
projects.description: Comprehensive financial analysis of pharmaceutical company with investment recommendation.
projects.details: Conducted detailed review of Merck & Co including financial performance, market position, and business risks. Analyzed company against competitors. Reviewed 3 major business segments. Built financial projections under different business scenarios. Assessed 25+ business risks and opportunities. Generated investment recommendation with supporting financial analysis. Demonstrates ability to synthesize complex business information and provide clear recommendations.

projects.title: Financial Control & Reconciliation
projects.description: 18 months managing financial accuracy, reconciliation, and audit readiness.
projects.details: Performed monthly reconciliation of accounts and cost tracking. Identified and resolved discrepancies. Maintained audit-ready financial records. Supported external audits and financial close processes. Ensured financial accuracy and compliance.

projects.title: Advanced Financial Training
projects.description: Master's-level training in finance, financial analysis, and business decision-making.
projects.details: Completed advanced coursework in corporate finance and financial analysis. Developed expertise in financial assessment and strategic recommendations. Applied knowledge to real-world business scenarios.

experience.description: Operations environment while completing advanced financial research.
Led system implementation and process optimization. Managed cross-functional teams.
Financial reconciliation, cost analysis, and audit support for 8-person finance team.

education.highlights: Thesis: Financial data analysis of market factors. Coursework in Corporate Finance and Financial Analysis.

contact.message: I'm interested in supporting financial success through analysis and strategic insight. Let's discuss how I can contribute to your organization.
contact.cta: Let's talk about how I can add value to your team.
